title: PROUVOST Dimitri
text:
About
Welcome. I’m an MSc Finance student at HEC Lausanne, focused on Asset & Risk Management. This page offers a preview of my work, which explores how macroeconomic forces drive financial markets. Feel free to explore.

title: PROUVOST Dimitri
text:
Research projects

Oil Shocks & Global Equity Markets
Regime-dependent OLS, VAR, and IRF analysis on global equity returns (1990–2026)
A 9,400-observation empirical study investigating whether oil price shocks have stronger negative effects on equity returns during economic downturns, and whether developed and emerging markets respond differently. Implemented Newey-West HAC inference, three VAR systems with bootstrapped impulse responses, and forecasting against Welch & Goyal (2008) benchmark.
Tech: Python (statsmodels, NumPy, Pandas) · MSc Finance, HEC Lausanne · 2026
